title: The Silent Gavel
knownFacts: The ceremonial gavel was reported missing from the locked display niche in Judge Harrow's chambers.
The loss was discovered during a short courthouse reception.
Only three regular staff members had practical access to the chambers during the reception.
The display niche lock appears intact at first glance.
openQuestions: How was the gavel removed if the niche was locked?
Which staff member had the opportunity to interfere with the display?
Why does the reception schedule matter?
activeLeads: Inspect the sideboard and tea service
